stage4_output.text: Identify the stakeholders who are responsible for troubleshooting, managing, operating, overseeing, and controlling the system during and after deployment.
stage4_output.object: the stakeholders who are responsible for troubleshooting , managing , operating , overseeing , and controlling the system during and after deployment

stage4_output.text: The ultimate responsibility for oversight and risk mitigation lies solely with the end-user's IT department rather than the system provider.
stage4_output.actor: The ultimate responsibility for oversight and risk mitigation

stage4_output.text: The method SHALL be defined and documented to evaluate whether each oversight or control function can be accomplished by stakeholders in realistic conditions of system use.
stage4_output.object: and documented to evaluate whether each oversight or control function can be accomplished by stakeholders in realistic conditions of system use.
stage4_output.temporal: by stakeholders in realistic conditions of
stage4_output.manner: by stakeholders in realistic conditions of system use

stage4_output.text: Metrics or rubrics SHALL be included that will be used in the evaluations. When this is not possible, guidance SHALL be provided to the third party responsible for evaluating oversight or control functions.
stage4_output.object: that will be used in the evaluations. When this is not possible, guidance SHALL be provided to the third party responsible for evaluating oversight or control functions.
